summary: Iteration 12 testing complete. All official ΠΑΑΟΚ Α' Όμιλος 2025-2026 data verified (105 fixtures, 11 teams standings). New Shop page working correctly with tickets (€5/€3/free) and merchandise. Navigation updated to 7 items with Εισιτήρια. All previous features (Push Notifications, Transfers) still working.

minor.issue: ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ 2024 has 19 fixtures in DB but standings show 20 games played - minor data discrepancy from seed script

critical_code_review_comments: Official ΠΑΑΟΚ data correctly loaded: 105 fixtures, 11 teams in standings
Standings order correct: ΠΑΣ ΖΑΚΑΚΙΟΥ (57pts) first, ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ 2024 (42pts) third, ΠΑΡΘΕΝΩΝ ΧΑΛΚΟΥΤΣΑΣ (0pts) last
All 105 fixtures have status=Completed as expected
Homepage hero stats bar shows dynamic data from standings: 3η position, 20 games, 61 goals, 42 points
Standings table shows all 11 teams with GF, GA, GD columns enabled (ΓΥ, ΓΚ, ΔΓ headers)
ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ 2024 row highlighted in gold in standings table
Navigation has 7 items: Αρχική, Σχετικά, Ομάδα, Ακαδημία, Νέα, Εισιτήρια, Επικοινωνία
Push notification bell icon present in navigation
Shop page (/shop) loads correctly with data-testid='shop-page'
Tickets section shows: General €5, Student €3, Under-12 Free
Merchandise grid shows 6 items with prices
Season pass card shows €40 for all home games
Footer has Εισιτήρια link in quick links section
Team Hub Overview shows ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ 2024 record: 12W 3D 4L = 19 games
Team Hub Results tab shows all 105 league fixtures
Team Hub Schedule calendar functional with month navigation
Match Report page works for fixtures with score display
GET /api/push/vapid-key returns correct VAPID public key
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested existing official ΠΑΑΟΚ data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified: 1) Official ΠΑΑΟΚ Α' Όμιλος 2025-2026 data - 105 fixtures (all Completed), 11 teams in standings with correct order and points. 2) New Shop page at /shop with tickets (€5/€3/free), 6 merchandise items, €40 season pass. 3) Navigation updated to 7 items including Εισιτήρια. 4) Homepage dynamic stats from standings (3η, 20 games, 61 goals, 42 points). 5) Standings table has GF/GA/GD columns, ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ 2024 highlighted. 6) Team Hub shows 105 fixtures in Results tab, 19 ΛΕΥΤΕΡΙΑ matches in Overview. 7) Push notifications and transfers from iteration 10 still working.
